portfolio_purpose: Same-wallet trust producer (AadhaarChain) feeds buyer commerce, seller commerce, and FlatWatch transparency. Every action must map to a concrete user outcome.

test_wallet.note: Deterministic Solana keypair generated at runtime by graders; fixtures seeded via gateway POST /api/identity/dev/fixtures/{wallet}

apps.usecase: Produce wallet-bound trust state without leaking raw Aadhaar/PAN evidence to downstream apps.
apps.success_definition: A wallet can create an identity anchor, complete verification (or fixture), reach trust_state=verified, and issue/verify audience-bound proof tokens.

flows.name: Gateway health
Landing page loads with brand CTA
flows.success: First viewport shows brand and a meaningful next action (wallet connect or create identity).

flows.name: Create identity anchor via API
Dev fixture matrix covers all trust states
flows.success: Each fixture_state returns matching trust_state on trust read surface.

flows.name: Proof token rejected unless verified
flows.success: Unverified wallets cannot obtain proof challenges; verified wallets can.

flows.name: Wallet signs proof challenge and gateway verifies
Critical routes render without crash
flows.success: Each route returns HTTP 200 and shows a page-specific heading or primary CTA (not a blank/error shell).

flows.name: Trust surface never returns raw document fields

apps.usecase: Let a shopper discover products, manage cart, and complete trust-gated checkout using AadhaarChain trust — never raw identity evidence.
apps.success_definition: Search→product→cart works without trust; checkout/cancel/support/agent-write require verified trust and show concrete labels (not vague disabled states).

flows.name: Search page loads with categories and trust notice
flows.success: Buyer can start discovery immediately; trust chip/notice is meaningful.

flows.name: Demo search returns grocery items
flows.success: At least one product card is actionable.

flows.name: Cart works; checkout gated without verified trust
flows.success: Checkout CTA either requires trust with an explicit reason or proceeds only when verified.

flows.name: Buyer action policy: elevated actions need verified
flows.success: Unit/policy grader asserts checkout/cancel/support/agent_write require verified; search/cart do not.

flows.name: Orders page tabs are concrete statuses
flows.success: Order filters map to real order lifecycle states.

flows.name: Agent page explains runtime/trust mode
flows.success: Agent surface never looks empty/vague — shows runtime or auth/trust reason.

flows.name: Vitest suite passes
flows.success: exit_code=0

apps.usecase: Let a merchant manage catalog and fulfill orders, with verified trust required for writes.
apps.success_definition: Reads work with wallet/session; catalog create/edit/delete and order accept/reject/dispatch require verified trust and clear CTAs.

flows.name: Dashboard shows catalog pulse and proof CTA
flows.success: Seller lands on an actionable control surface.

flows.name: Catalog lists demo items with Edit/Delete meaning
flows.success: Each listed product has concrete management actions.

flows.name: Orders queue exposes Accept/Reject/Dispatch
flows.success: Fulfillment actions are explicit lifecycle verbs.

flows.name: Seller action policy: writes need verified
flows.success: catalog_save/delete and order_accept/reject/dispatch require verified.

flows.name: Config page has Save and Test connection
flows.success: Operator config actions are concrete.

flows.name: Seller agent shows approval gate language
flows.success: Agent write path is explicit about approval/trust.

flows.name: Vitest suite passes
flows.success: exit_code=0

flows.name: Document/fix demo catalog SKU alignment with buyer
flows.problem: Buyer and seller demo catalogs must share SKUs; buyer checkout must bridge into seller demo order queue via ondc-portfolio-demo-orders.
flows.success: Shared demo SKUs OR documented intentional isolation with a bridge for portfolio E2E.

apps.usecase: Give housing-society residents transparent finance visibility: sync money feed, upload receipts, challenge suspicious txns, ask Chat Guard — elevated writes require AadhaarChain verified trust.
apps.success_definition: Resident can sign in, sync transactions, view dashboard; receipt upload/challenge submit disabled with explicit Trust required until verified; chat explains runtime.

flows.name: Backend health
Demo resident login issues JWT
Sync transactions then read summary
flows.success: Summary includes balance/inflow/outflow numeric fields.

flows.name: Landing → dashboard sign-in
flows.success: Authenticated dashboard shows financial summary and Sync now.

flows.name: Receipt upload gated without verified trust
flows.success: Upload CTA is either enabled (verified) or explicitly Trust required.

flows.name: Challenge submit gated without verified trust
flows.success: Challenge form uses concrete transaction selection and trust-aware submit.

flows.name: Chat Guard page shows suggested queries
flows.success: Chat surface offers meaningful suggested actions, not an empty box.

flows.name: Backend pytest suite
flows.success: exit_code=0

flows.name: Frontend Jest suite
flows.success: exit_code=0

flows.name: Receipt/challenge APIs must enforce trust server-side
flows.problem: UI gates trust but backend receipt/challenge routes accept resident JWT without wallet trust check.
flows.success: Backend rejects elevated writes when X-Wallet-Address trust is not verified (or documents intentional demo exception with flag).

portfolio_journeys.success: Trust producer healthy → consumers show coherent trust-gated UX.
